name: drishvara-site
description: Initial website for Drishvara — a founder-led insight platform. First live trigger

scripts.refresh:homepage: node scripts/build-sports-context.js && node scripts/build-daily-context.js && node scripts/refresh-homepage.js && node scripts/fix-featured-images.js && node scripts/apply-bilingual-metadata.js && node scripts/build-seo.js
scripts.pipeline:live-preflight: npm run refresh:homepage && npm run publish:local-check && node scripts/pipeline-live-preflight.js --latest-drafts
scripts.pipeline:live-preflight:approved: npm run refresh:homepage && npm run publish:local-check && node scripts/pipeline-live-preflight.js --latest-drafts --require-approved

scripts.knowledge:preflight: node scripts/knowledge-preflight.js && npm run knowledge:daily-guidance:preflight && npm run knowledge:word-of-day:preflight && npm run knowledge:daily-guidance-rules:preflight && npm run knowledge:daily-guidance-selection:preflight && npm run knowledge:panchang-festival:preflight && npm run knowledge:mantra-review:preflight && npm run knowledge:subscriber-personalization:preflight && npm run knowledge:subscriber-gate:preflight && npm run knowledge:subscriber-dashboard:preflight && npm run knowledge:governance-report:preflight
scripts.public-preview:preflight: node scripts/public-preview-preflight.js && npm run ui:language-runtime:preflight && npm run ui:language-runtime-neutralization:preflight && npm run ui:language-toggle-click:preflight && npm run i18n:content-expansion:preflight && npm run i18n:static-copy-apply:preflight && npm run i18n:hindi-body-sidecar:preflight && npm run knowledge:daily-guidance:preflight && npm run knowledge:word-of-day:preflight && npm run knowledge:daily-guidance-rules:preflight && npm run knowledge:daily-guidance-selection:preflight && npm run knowledge:panchang-festival:preflight && npm run knowledge:mantra-review:preflight && npm run knowledge:subscriber-personalization:preflight && npm run knowledge:subscriber-gate:preflight && npm run knowledge:subscriber-dashboard:preflight && npm run knowledge:governance-report:preflight
